---
name: decision-support
description: "Use when: run decision quality, help me decide, decision support, evaluate options"
---

Follow [Workflows/decision-quality.md](../../Workflows/decision-quality.md).

Required inputs (ask if any are missing):
- the exact decision in one sentence
- at least 2 realistic options
- key constraints and deadline
- decision owner and approver

Steps:
1. State the decision clearly
2. Compare options on: value, risk, cost, speed, reversibility
3. Identify assumptions and confidence level
4. Name decision owner and approver
5. Define follow-up checkpoint and success criteria

Apply [Evals/decision-quality-check.md](../../Evals/decision-quality-check.md) before finalizing.

Save output to `Artifacts/decision-logs/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>.md` using [Templates/decision-record.md](../../Templates/decision-record.md).
